allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('chartType:', j.chartType\); console.log\('series[0].name:', j.series?.[0]?.name\); console.log\('data length:', j.series?.[0]?.data?.length\); if\(j.error\) console.log\('ERROR:', j.error\);")

PowerShell($r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/integrations/tgg/newsapi-education' -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "newsapi status: $\($r1.StatusCode\)"; $r1.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3)
